prompt: Kuukikan (空気感) style hyper-realistic film photograph. London commuter train, early morning. Soft diffused morning light streams through the window. Outside, the London suburban cityscape flows by in gentle motion blur — terraced houses, railway cuttings, grey sky. The upper two-thirds of the frame are generous negative space: the window light, blurred passing scenery, and the quiet interior of the carriage. In the lower third of the frame, a Black British woman's left hand grips the hanging strap (standing), while her right hand holds an iPhone. On the phone screen, small but visible, a shoe product card interface. Her right thumb is mid-swipe, pushing a card to the left — the decisive moment of filtering. Her skin tone is rich dark brown, natural, with visible knuckle texture and a simple ring. No face visible — just hands and phone. The train window glass catches an extremely subtle prismatic spectral refraction (barely noticeable rainbow hint) at its edge. Color grading: neutral, film-like desaturation. The train interior greys contrast with the warm morning light through the window. Composition: 16:9 wide frame. Subject (hands + phone) is small in the lower portion. The window and passing light dominate. Camera: 50mm lens, f/2.8, ISO 400. Authentic film grain (ISO 400 level, slightly grainy). Old-lens peripheral softness and vignette. The mood is quiet concentration during a commute — a mundane moment hiding a careful decision. Calm, focused, everyday stillness.
negative_prompt: dramatic lighting, lens flare, HDR, oversaturated, CGI, plastic skin, studio lighting, face visible, dark moody, underground tube, text overlays, watermarks, logos, AI smoothing, digital painting, anime, cartoon, illustration
